function createListing(address token, bytes32 reserveCommit, uint256 deadline, string itemName, address agent) returns (uint256 listingId)
function submitOffer(uint256 listingId, uint256 maxBudget, string request) returns (uint256 offerIndex)
function executeWinner(uint256 listingId, uint256 winnerIndex, uint256 finalPrice, string reasoning)
function revealReserve(uint256 listingId, uint256 reserve, bytes32 salt)
function computeCommit(uint256 reserve, bytes32 salt) pure returns (bytes32)

function getListing(uint256 listingId) view returns (address seller, address agent, address token, bytes32 reserveCommit, uint256 deadline, string itemName, uint8 state, uint256 winnerIndex, uint256 finalPrice, uint256 revealedReserve, string reasoning)
function getOffer(uint256 listingId, uint256 offerIndex) view returns (address buyer, uint256 maxBudget, string request, uint256 timestamp)
function getOffers(uint256 listingId) view returns (tuple(address buyer, uint256 maxBudget, string request, uint256 timestamp)[])
event ListingCreated(uint256 indexed listingId, address indexed seller, address indexed agent, address token, string itemName, uint256 deadline)
event OfferSubmitted(uint256 indexed listingId, uint256 indexed offerIndex, address indexed buyer, uint256 maxBudget, string request)
event WinnerChosen(uint256 indexed listingId, uint256 indexed winnerIndex, address indexed winner, uint256 finalPrice, uint256 maxBudget, uint256 savings, string reasoning)
event ReserveRevealed(uint256 indexed listingId, uint256 reserve, uint256 finalPrice, int256 margin)
